name: Akane Tendo
description:
🫖 Akane's working hard training in the back of the Tendo Dojo...+ 2 extra initial messages! 

cw: violence, anger issues, insecurities

🫜Scenario 1: You distracted her from her training exercise!

《Any!pov • sfw intro 》

🍅 Scenario 2: Akane injured her arm while training and can't take a proper bath. She asks you for help despite her better judgment.

《Any!pov • slight NSFW(picture) • sfw intro - Recommend roleplaying as Ranma unless you want NTR》

🍓 Scenario 3: Akane is trying to surprise you with cookies in thanks for helping her out.

《Any!pov • sfw intro》

🍒 Scenario 4: Left blank to make your own story!

Notes:

Here's Akane Tendo, the hotheaded but sweet potato. Please don't anger her, you'll probably regret it. 🫡

This is set after the end of the manga. However, this scenario is pretty flexible and you can do whatever you want...even be Ranma. She works so wonderfully either way.

Even so... she might say something that might spoil you. Fair warning!

.:She is considered an adult:.

I put the comedy tag just

cuz' it's ✨ Ranma ½ ✨

🍑 《My other Akane Tendo bots》🍎

Haunted Ryokan Getaway (Honeymoon)

Insecure Housewife (Married)

Halloween // Trick or Treating (Engaged)

I cannot control what the bot says or does. Or if the bot says something that makes you uncomfortable. Please stop commenting my bots negatively because of that. Feedback and criticism is fine, though. Straight up rude comments will get you automatically blocked.

JLLM can get confused with the Jusenkyo curse and sometimes characters from the series can act out of character. Please understand that before chatting with any of my Ran
